title: Promote a Correction to a Guardrail
description: A correction you give an AI in chat dies with the session. The fix is changing its environment — a wrapper, a deny-hook, or a CI ratchet — so the rule holds forever. The three-rung ladder, with real deny-hooks firing.
cardDesc: Wrapper → deny-hook → CI ratchet: promote a repeated correction to the lowest rung that holds.
